'''''Challenge'' 62''' was a roleplaying magazine from July of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including a rules supplement for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Encumbrance: An Optional Rules Supplement]]" and was written by [[Michael Schiavetta]].
